videoSnippet.title: Annihilation || Bogdan-Daniel Deac vs Jorden van Foreest || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Deac, Bogdan-Daniel (2650) - Van Foreest, Jorden (2735)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.05.14
A20 English opening

1.c4 e5 2.g3 g6 3.d4 exd4 4.Qxd4 Nf6 5.Bg2 Nc6 6.Qe3+ Qe7 7.Nc3 Nb4 8.Qd2 Bg7 9.Nf3 O-O 10.O-O c6 11.e4 d6 12.Rd1 Nd7 13.a3 Na6 14.Qc2 Ne5 15.Nxe5 dxe5 16.b4 Nc7 17.c5 Bg4 18.f3 Be6 19.Be3 f5 20.Rab1 f4 21.Bf2 fxg3 22.hxg3 Bf7 23.b5 Ne6 24.bxc6 bxc6 25.Ne2 Rad8 26.Qa4 Qc7 27.Qa6 Ng5 28.f4 Ne6 29.f5 Ng5 30.g4 gxf5 31.gxf5 Kh8 32.Ng3 Rg8 33.Qe2 Rd4 34.Be3 Bf6 35.Kf2 Bc4 36.Qh5 Qg7 37.Qh2 Nxe4+ 38.Bxe4 Rxe4 39.Rb7 Qxb7 40.Nxe4 Qb2+ 41.Rd2 Qb1 42.Ng3 e4 43.Rd7 Qb2+ 44.Rd2 Qa1 45.Rd7 Qb2+ 46.Rd2 Qxa3 47.Nxe4 Qa1 48.Qh3 Bd5 49.Nxf6 Qg1+ 50.Ke2 Rg2+ 51.Kd3 Qb1+ 52.Kd4 Qa1+ 53.Kd3 Qa3+ 54.Kc2 Qb3+ 55.Kc1 Qc3+ 56.Kb1 Ba2+

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:02 Game Starts!
02:25 CNG (0-0-0)
10:45 Pause the Video!
15:10 It Was in This Position!
17:40 Legends Of The Channel
